name: Tinderbox Docs Portal
description: Developer documentation portal for the Tinderbox CLI. Compares a text-first reading experience against a playground-first try-it-now layout, across single-column and three-pane layouts.

variants.name: Text-first
variants.description: Long-form prose lead. Code samples inline. Designed for readers who learn by reading.

variants.name: Playground-first
variants.description: Editable code sample on top, explanation below. Designed for readers who learn by tinkering.

themes.name: Paper
themes.description: Warm off-white background with a serif body face. Reading-optimized.

themes.name: Console
themes.description: Dark terminal-adjacent palette with a mono body face for code-heavy pages.

layouts.name: Single column
layouts.description: Centered prose, no sidebars. Optimal line length, minimal chrome.

layouts.name: Three pane
layouts.description: Left TOC, center content, right on-page outline. Reference-style.
